instruction: Rewrite the content to meet insurance regulatory and compliance standards.

input.draft_text:
Meet Your Financial Goals for the New Year With Term Insurance
As the year comes to a close, we enter the period where we set new goals for  the new year, and put new plans  into places, to ensure that the next year will be better than the ones that have passed. Irrespective of the fact that  whether or not one earns, one might consider setting financial goals for the new year.
For a better financial future of  you and your family, there is a lot that you may consider doing. If you want to start the new year by creating financial security for your loved ones, you may consider buying a term life insurance policy. Not only can it offer some future financial security to your family members but also help them focus on their future goals in case of your untimely demise.
Financial Planning for your Loved Ones
Many Individuals expect their new year to start on a good note and set their new year’s resolutions accordingly,hoping for the wellbeingwork of themselves and their loved ones all the time. However, at times, these hopes may not end the way one has expects.. Change can be considered one of the few constants of life, and life can be full of ups and downs. One may or may not achieve all the goals set for the new year, be it related to health and well-being, finances or any other.
In such cases, you would want to hope for the best but prepare for the worst. One of the important preparations for a better tomorrow may also include financial planning  to keep your family safe and ensure that your new year’s financial resolutions hold provisions for the same. Such a consideration may ensure that irrespective of what they could face, and whether or not they have you around to support them, they can support themselves.
Financial well-being may help lay the foundation for a good financial future. But, how do you ensure financial well-being and the meeting of your financial goals, especially when there is an uncertainty? This is where life insurance comes into play. It is a way to create a secure financial corpus for your family and their future.
Understanding Term Life Plans
Term life insurance is a life insurance plan with affordable premium. Considering the value of life insurance, if you seek a life cover but want something relatively affordable, you may opt for a term insurance plan. Not only can these plans be affordable, but they are also relatively simpler in design.
But what is term insurance? And why should you consider it, especially as a part of your new year’s financial resolutions? A simple way of understanding term insurance is looking at it as a financial safety net that your family might need in case of any unfortunate event.
You are required to name a nominee when you purchase a term insurance plan. For the premiums you pay during the policy term, the insurance provider covers your life and offers sum assured to your nominee in case of occurrence of an unfortunate event covered in the policy, subject to policy terms and conditions. To get policy cost estimates or premium estimates, you can use a term insurance calculator.
These policies may also offer some optional riders. These are add-on features that can be opted with your plan on payment of nominal additional premium, which can help make your plan comprehensive. Once you understand what term life insurance is, along with the purpose that each rider serves, you can opt for the plan that suits your requirement.
Why get a Term Plan this New Year?
As a part of your new year’s resolutions you can consider taking a chance to begin something new. You may take this opportunity to get your finances in order, beginning with the creation of a new year’s financial checklist to ensure financial security.
Buying a term plan can be one such thing in your checklist which might help to  sort through your financial goals for the new year. With a term plan added to your new year’s financial checklist, you can be a step closer in ensuring your family’s financial future is secure. You may also opt for a critical illnesses or accidental death benefit cover/rider, by paying  nominal additional amount over the premium. If something unfortunate happens to you during the policy term, a term plan will have you and your loved ones covered. The earlier you buy a term plan in your life, the more affordable will be the premiums.
You can use a term insurance calculator to get an idea of how much premium you may be required to pay each year, based on the policy term, premium payment term, sum assured, etc. that you select.
Such a decision might also help you be more deliberate about your financial choices by laying the foundation for financial stability, not only for the next few months but possibly in the years to come. So if you have not opted for one yet, why not start with this new year?
Disclaimer:
The views stated in this article are not to be construed as investment advice and readers are suggested to seek independent financial advice before making any investment decisions. For more details on risk factors, terms and conditions please read the sales brochure & policy document (available on www.bajajallianzlife.com) carefully before concluding a sale. Bajaj Allianz Life Insurance Company Ltd., Regd. office Address: Bajaj Allianz House, Airport Road, Yerawada, Pune - 411006, Reg. No.: 116, CIN: U66010PN2001PLC015959, Call us on toll free No.: 1800 209 7272, Mail us: customercare@bajajallianz.co.in, Fax No: 02066026789
